body: talking to you always brightens my days. you uplift me at times when that isn't even your intention. my one true ray of sunshine. ☀️
you are the prettiest girl in the whole world.
i miss you. i wish i was taking a nap with my sweet girl.
you are the smartest woman i know. i know you'll do well on your exam. i love you. ♥
you are the most important person to me in any room.
you push me to be a better person. i'm so lucky to be a part of your life. 🌷
